name: Caraway Cheese Crisps
recipeInstructions:
-(About 3 cups)
Preheat oven to 425°F. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients until well combined.
Shape the dough into 1/2-inch balls. Place three dough balls in a cluster on an ungreased cookie sheet. Flatten the cluster with your fingers to about 1/4-inch thickness. Repeat with remaining balls, spacing clusters about 2 inches apart. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes until lightly browned. Using a pancake turner, transfer cheese crisps to wire racks and let cool. Store in a tightly covered container and use within 3 days. Makes about 5 dozen.
Each crisp: About 45 calories, 3 g fat, 6 mg cholesterol, 65 mg sodium.
